title: narcissus sylvestris var. johnstonii
intro: Narcissus sylvestris var. johnstonii, also known as the wild daffodil, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant is rich in health benefits, including its potential to protect against cancer, reduce oxidative stress, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Narcissus sylvestris var. johnstonii can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
